title: Fibers, channels, and GC runtime
description:
Closed **2026-05-20** on superrepo [`f57377a`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid/commit/f57377a) (v0.2 delivery tip).

Spawn/fiber runtime surfaces, channel primitives, vendored **abfall** GC heap integration, runtime module alignment, and platform-spec GC/interop alignment.

Workstreams: `codegen-runtime`. **9** catalog tasks anchor this deliverable (`milestoneId: v02-concurrency-runtime`).

## Provenance
- [`12ee673`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/12ee673) (`compiler`) — feat: spawn/fiber runtime, channels, and split System I/O surfaces
- [`3a9a083`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/3a9a083) (`corelib`) — corelib: syscall surfaces, docs, and tests
- [`0ded628`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/0ded628) (`compiler`) — compiler: runtime/ABI updates, doc command, corelib submodule bump, tests
- [`6ecd493`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/6ecd493) (`compiler`) — feat(runtime): vendored abfall GC and Beskid heap integration
- [`6db12d2`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/6db12d2) (`corelib`) — fix(ci): run corelib prelude lowering tests on an 8 MiB stack
- [`ee3d83d`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/ee3d83d) (`corelib`) — feat(corelib): expand syscall coverage and stdlib tests
- [`2ddddb3`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/beskid_standard/commit/2ddddb3) (`corelib`) — test(corelib): extend concurrency tests and align concurrency packages
- [`4e5bfca`](https://github.com/Cyber-Nomad-Collective/compiler/commit/4e5bfca) (`compiler`) — docs(abfall): document Beskid vendoring and upstream repository link
- *…and 1 more seed tasks with provenance commits.*

## Catalog scope
- **Delivery version:** v0.2 (Analysis, packages, and platform spec)
- **Deliverable:** `v02-concurrency-runtime` — Fibers, channels, and GC runtime
